productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Cloud 9 Black Casual Shoes
description: Stylish and uber cool, these casual shoes from the united colors of benetton will add an extra bounce to your steps. When you hang out with the cool gang in these light-weight leather shoes, you will easily become the coolest member of the group! Look stylish and wow in these comfortable shoes all day long. Upper Full-grain leather upper in a slightly distressed look for added durability and style Patent leather overlays on the forefoot, midfoot and behind the collar for better structure and style Metallic embellishments on the midfoot for added attraction Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Sofly padded tongue and mildly cushioned collar for in-step comfort and a secure fit Big Ben logo on tongue Midsole EVA midsole for long-term durability and protection of feet against impact Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Fabric lining for increased comfort Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Textured panels for better grip shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
